name: postgres-explorer
description: PostgreSQL database explorer for VS Code with notebook support [Nightly]

commands.title: SQL Assistant: Open in Editor Tab
Backup & Restore Workspace: Choose Connection & Database…
DDL Viewer: Open as Editable Copy

walkthroughs.title: PgStudio: PostgreSQL in VS Code
walkthroughs.description: Connect to a database, explore objects, and run SQL in notebooks.

steps.title: Add a database connection
steps.description:
Save your server and credentials securely, then connect.
[Add PostgreSQL Connection](command:postgres-explorer.addConnection)

steps.title: Open the PG Studio explorer
steps.description:
Browse databases, schemas, and objects from the sidebar.
[Show PG Studio](command:workbench.view.extension.postgres-explorer)

steps.title: Create a SQL notebook
steps.description:
Use interactive `.pgsql` notebooks for queries and results.
[New SQL Notebook](command:postgres-explorer.newNotebook)

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the PostgreSQL server

port.description: Port number of the PostgreSQL server

environment.description: Environment tag for safety warnings and visual indicators

readOnlyMode.description: Force read-only transactions for this connection

postgresExplorer.aiProvider.description: Deprecated: use ai.notebook.provider or ai.chat.provider. Kept for migration.

postgresExplorer.aiApiKey.description: Deprecated: API keys are stored in Secret Storage per provider via AI Settings.

postgresExplorer.ai.chat.provider.description: AI provider for the SQL Assistant chat panel

postgresExplorer.ai.chat.model.description: Model for chat. Leave empty for provider default.

postgresExplorer.ai.notebook.provider.description: AI provider for notebook assist, dashboard, and saved-query AI

postgresExplorer.ai.notebook.model.description: Model for notebook AI features. Leave empty for provider default.

postgresExplorer.ai.maxContextTokens.description: Approximate token budget for AI requests (system prompt + schema context + chat history). Oldest history is dropped first, then schema is trimmed, to keep requests within this budget.

postgresExplorer.streaming.enabled.description: Enable cursor-based streaming for large result sets

postgresExplorer.streaming.batchSize.description: Number of rows per batch when streaming results

postgresExplorer.telemetry.mode.description: Telemetry collection mode. off disables telemetry. basic sends anonymous usage counters. detailed adds anonymized performance buckets.

postgresExplorer.telemetry.maxBatchSize.description: Maximum number of events per telemetry batch.

postgresExplorer.telemetry.posthogHost.description: PostHog ingestion host used for telemetry transport.

postgresExplorer.telemetry.posthogApiKey.description: PostHog project API key. Keep empty to disable remote telemetry sink.

postgresExplorer.queryTimeout.description: Global query timeout in milliseconds (0 for no timeout). Can be overridden per connection.

postgresExplorer.performance.slowQueryTh.description: Threshold in milliseconds to flag slow queries in history and results.

postgresExplorer.performance.defaultLimi.description: Default row limit for SELECT queries when auto-LIMIT is enabled.

postgresExplorer.performance.slidingWind.description: Use a PostgreSQL SCROLL cursor for eligible SELECT queries (no SQL parameters): stream one window of rows into the cell and fetch more on scroll—bounded RAM on host and webview.
Maximum rows kept in the result grid at once when sliding-window streaming is active.

postgresExplorer.query.autoLimitEnabled.description: Automatically append LIMIT clause to SELECT queries that don't have one. Always enabled in read-only mode.

postgresExplorer.query.byteaDisplayForma.description: Display format for binary (bytea) columns in query results: 0x-prefixed hex, PostgreSQL \x hex, or JSON Buffer shape (debug).

postgresExplorer.query.executionFailureS.description: Strategy when a statement fails in multi-statement execution: 'continue-on-error' (execute remaining, show summary), 'fail-on-error' (stop immediately), 'prompt-on-error' (ask user per failure).

postgresExplorer.parameters.cacheLastVal.description: Remember the last entered SQL parameter values in this workspace.

postgresExplorer.parameters.nullSentinel.description: Exact input text that is sent as SQL NULL for prompted parameters. Set empty string to disable.

postgresExplorer.autoRefresh.enabled.description: Enable automatic background refresh of the explorer tree and notebooks panel.

postgresExplorer.autoRefresh.pollInterva.description: How often (in seconds) to poll PostgreSQL for schema changes.

postgresExplorer.formatter.keywordCase.description: Keyword case used by the SQL formatter.

postgresExplorer.formatter.indentStyle.description: Indent style used by the SQL formatter.

postgresExplorer.formatter.tabWidth.description: Number of spaces per indent level in the SQL formatter.

postgresExplorer.formatter.useTabs.description: Use tabs instead of spaces for SQL formatter indentation.

postgresExplorer.formatter.linesBetweenQ.description: Number of blank lines between SQL statements in the formatter output.

pgstudio.ddlViewer.openOnSelection.description: Open the Definition Viewer automatically when selecting supported tree items.

pgstudio.ddlViewer.enabled.description: Enable SQL Preview (Definition Viewer) features and actions.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run esbuild-base -- --minify && npm run esbuild-renderer -- --minify && npm run esbuild-erd-webview -- --minify
scripts.compile: tsc -p ./ && npm run esbuild-renderer && npm run esbuild-erd-webview && npm run copy-templates
scripts.esbuild: npm run esbuild-base -- --sourcemap && npm run esbuild-renderer -- --sourcemap && npm run esbuild-erd-webview -- --sourcemap
scripts.esbuild-watch: npm run esbuild-base -- --sourcemap --watch & npm run esbuild-renderer -- --sourcemap --watch & npm run esbuild-erd-webview -- --sourcemap --watch
scripts.test: npm run compile && mocha --loader ./node_modules/ts-node/esm/transpile-only.mjs -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:unit: npm run compile && TS_NODE_PROJECT=src/test/tsconfig.json node -r ts-node/register/transpile-only -r tsconfig-paths/register -r ./src/test/setup.ts ./node_modules/mocha/bin/mocha --exit 'src/test/unit/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:integration: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/integration/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.test:renderer: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/RendererComponents.test.ts'
scripts.test:renderer:coverage: npm run compile && nyc ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/RendererComponents.test.ts'
scripts.test:versions: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/integration/ConnectionLifecycle.test.ts'
scripts.test:all: npm run compile && ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.coverage: npm run compile && nyc ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts --exit 'src/test/unit/**/*.test.ts'
scripts.coverage:phase-utils: npm run compile && npx c8 --config .c8rc.phase-utils.json ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/pgPassUtils.test.ts' 'src/test/unit/connectionUtils.test.ts' 'src/test/unit/NotebookTitle.test.ts'
scripts.coverage:phase-handlers: npm run compile && npx c8 --config .c8rc.phase-handlers.json ts-mocha -p src/test/tsconfig.json -r tsconfig-paths/register -r src/test/setup.ts 'src/test/unit/CoreHandlers.test.ts' 'src/test/unit/ExplainHandlers.test.ts' 'src/test/unit/TransactionHandlers.test.ts' 'src/test/unit/QueryHandlers.test.ts' 'src/test/unit/QueryHandlers.extended.test.ts'
scripts.coverage:phased: npm run coverage:phase-utils && npm run coverage:phase-handlers && node ./scripts/merge-coverage.js && npm run coverage:report
